gate.intro: Before you start, please read and agree:

point.files: Your music never leaves your machine.
point.filesRest: Files are held in the browser’s memory for this session only and are never uploaded to any server.
point.responsibility: What you open is your responsibility.
point.responsibilityRest: TickTune neither moderates nor stores that content.
point.youtube: YouTube mode uses YouTube’s official player
point.youtubeRest: ; by using it you are also bound by YouTube’s and Google’s terms.
point.asIs: The software is provided "AS IS", without warranty.

gate.agree: I have read and agree to the terms above.

offline.title: No network connection.
offline.youtube: YouTube mode needs a connection to play.

drop.hint: MP3 · M4A · AAC · FLAC · WAV · OGG · Opus · WebM — up to 10:02

countdown.matchLocked: Every track in the queue needs a known duration

hint.single: Choose one audio file to begin.
hint.playlist: Choose at least one audio file to begin.
hint.youtubeOffline: A network connection is required to play YouTube videos.
hint.range: The countdown must be between 1 second and 24 hours.
hint.singleOnly: Single mode takes exactly one file — remove some, or go back to Playlist.
hint.unplayable: The selected file cannot be played.

paste.label: Paste YouTube links — one per line

blocked.title: Cannot be played here
blocked.cause: The owner disabled embedding, or the video is age-restricted / region-blocked.

gone.title: This video is gone
gone.cause: The video was deleted or made private.

invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.cause: YouTube does not accept this parameter.

player.title: Player error
player.cause: The HTML5 player reported an error.

loop.label: Loop style
loop.fallback: Crossfade is saved but not in this build — playing with a hard cut.

focus.hint: Press H to leave focus mode
focus.railLocked: The player must stay visible — YouTube terms

import.TT-IMP-005: Duplicate of a file already added
import.TT-IMP-006: Tags unreadable — using the file name
import.TT-IMP-007: Tag encoding broken — using the file name
import.TT-IMP-008: Too many entries in the dropped folder
import.TT-YT-001: Could not check — will retry when you start
import.TT-YT-101: The owner does not allow embedding

general.resetHint: Deletes every setting saved on this machine.
general.resetConfirm: Delete every saved setting? You will be asked to accept the terms again, because acceptance is stored with them.

audio.deferred: Crossfade and the single-track loop style are not in this build yet — they are waiting on spike S4b.

playback.duplicatesHint: Applies to the next import; tracks already added are unaffected.

hotkeys.note: Shortcuts are off while you are typing in a field.

diagnostics.copyFailed: The clipboard refused. Select the text below and copy it by hand.
diagnostics.privacy: Carries no file names and no track titles — safe to paste into a bug report.
